description: Dry-run-first Google Ads search-term intent analyzer and negative-keyword MCP for agents.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/google-ads-intent-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Google Ads developer token used only when live Google Ads access is configured.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: OAuth client ID used only when live Google Ads access is configured.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth client secret used only when live Google Ads access is configured.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth refresh token used only when live Google Ads access is configured.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Google Ads customer ID for live account queries.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CUSTOMER_ID
